However, securing all three players won’t be easy, with strong competition expected for each of them. arts.ttl: Levi Colwill gives honest Thomas Tuchel verdict as England told to learn from Chelsea success
arts.sum: While not playing a first-team game, he was a member of the pre-season tour squad ahead of the 2022-23 campaign and spent time working with the new England manager, who led Chelsea to Champions League glory in 2021. Chelsea defender Levi Colwill has described Thomas Tuchel as a "top manager" as the former Blues boss prepares to name his first England squad.

arts.ttl: Chelsea Transfer News: Blues get discount on Nigerian superstar Vitcor Boniface after failed Saudi move
arts.sum: Bayer Leverkusen are looking to sell Victor Boniface this summer, according to German media. The Nigerian superstar was an undisputed starter for Xabi Alonso at Bayer Leverkusen at the start of the season, but an injury and other issues have seen him lose his place.
